itemDisplayName: Deploy a Windows Server 2025 VM with Trusted Launch
description: Deploys a Windows Server 2025 virtual machine with Trusted Launch (Secure Boot + vTPM), Standard public IP, RDP access, and configurable VM size. Supports multiple Windows Server 2025 editions including Azure Edition with cloud-native features such as hotpatching.
summary: Windows Server 2025 VM with Trusted Launch, Standard public IP, and RDP access.
